mapper.select: select id,parent_id,name,level,sort,description,enabled,create_time,update_time from category where enabled = 1 order by level ,sort , id
select c.id,parent_id,c.name,level,sort,c.description,enabled,c.create_time,c.update_time from category c left join product p on c.id = p.category_id where p.id = #{productId}

select p.name productName, c.name categoryName, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.create_time createTime, p.update_time updateTime from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.name like CONCAT('%',#{productName},'%')
